destination: マサイマラ国立保護区
description: Embark on an unforgettable 8-day adventure in the heart of Kenya's wilderness, where the vast savannahs of the Maasai Mara await your family's exploration. This journey promises thrilling wildlife encounters, breathtaking landscapes, and a chance to witness the majestic lions in their natural habitat. Perfect for families seeking adventure and connection with nature, each day is designed to immerse you in the beauty of the African landscape while ensuring a relaxed pace for your children to enjoy every moment. From thrilling safari rides to cultural experiences with the Maasai people, this trip will create lasting memories for your family.

transit.memo: Direct flight from Tokyo to Nairobi.

activities.description: Settle into the luxurious Sarova Panafric Hotel, known for its family-friendly amenities and beautiful gardens. Enjoy a refreshing drink by the pool after your long flight.
Experience a unique dining adventure at The Carnivore, famous for its variety of meats served in a traditional African style. Kids will love the fun atmosphere and the chance to try exotic dishes.

activities.activity: Evening stroll at Nairobi National Park
activities.description: Take a short evening drive to Nairobi National Park for a chance to see wildlife at dusk. This is a great way to kick off your safari adventure and spot some animals in their natural habitat.

transit.memo: Enjoy the scenic drive through the Great Rift Valley.

activities.description: Savor a delicious lunch at Mara River Lodge, where you can enjoy views of the river and possibly spot wildlife while you eat. The lodge offers a variety of local and international dishes, perfect for refueling after your journey.

Hop into a safari vehicle for an exhilarating afternoon game drive in Maasai Mara. This is your chance to see lions, elephants, and other wildlife in their natural habitat. The experienced guides will share fascinating insights about the animals and the ecosystem.

After an exciting day of wildlife viewing, return to the lodge for dinner. Enjoy a hearty meal while sharing stories of the day's adventures with your family. The lodge often features local cuisine, giving you a taste of Kenyan flavors.

Unwind at the lodge after dinner. You can enjoy the sounds of the African night, perhaps even spotting some nocturnal wildlife from the lodge's viewing deck. It's a perfect way to end your first day in Maasai Mara.
Start your day with a hearty breakfast at your lodge, featuring a variety of local and international dishes to fuel your safari adventure. Enjoy the stunning views of the Maasai Mara as you dine.

Hop into a safari vehicle for an exhilarating morning game drive. Keep your eyes peeled for the majestic lions, elephants, and other wildlife that roam freely in the Maasai Mara. The early morning is the best time to spot animals as they are most active.

Return to the lodge for a delicious lunch. Enjoy a selection of local dishes while sharing stories about the wildlife you've seen so far. This is a great time to relax and recharge for the afternoon activities.

Set out again for an afternoon game drive. This is another chance to see the incredible wildlife of the Maasai Mara, including the famous Big Five. The golden hour before sunset provides perfect lighting for photography.

After a thrilling day, enjoy a relaxing dinner at the lodge. Savor traditional Kenyan cuisine while listening to the sounds of the African night. This is a perfect time to reflect on the day's adventures with your family.
End your day with a stargazing experience. The clear skies of the Maasai Mara offer a breathtaking view of the stars. Your guide will point out constellations and share stories about the night sky.
Start your day with a hearty breakfast at your lodge, featuring a variety of local and international dishes to fuel your adventure in the Maasai Mara.
Embark on an exciting morning safari drive in a comfortable 4x4 vehicle. Keep your eyes peeled for the majestic lions and other wildlife that roam freely in the Maasai Mara.
Return to the lodge for a delicious lunch, where you can relax and share stories about the wildlife you've seen so far.

Set out for another thrilling safari drive in the afternoon. This is the perfect time to spot lions as they are often more active during this period. Enjoy the stunning landscapes and diverse wildlife.
After an exhilarating day, return to your lodge to unwind. Enjoy the beautiful sunset views over the savannah while sipping on a refreshing drink.
Indulge in a delightful dinner featuring local cuisine, where you can reflect on the day's adventures and plan for tomorrow's explorations.
End your day with a magical stargazing experience. The clear skies of the Maasai Mara offer a breathtaking view of the stars, perfect for family bonding.
Start your day with a hearty breakfast at your lodge, featuring fresh fruits, local pastries, and traditional Kenyan dishes to fuel your adventure ahead.

Experience the vibrant culture of the Maasai people. Engage with the locals, learn about their traditions, and enjoy a traditional dance performance. This immersive experience is perfect for families and offers a unique insight into their way of life.

activities.activity: Safari Drive in Maasai Mara National Reserve
activities.description: Hop into a safari vehicle for an exciting drive through the Maasai Mara. Keep your eyes peeled for the majestic lions, elephants, and other wildlife that roam freely in this stunning landscape. A perfect opportunity for your children to see real lions in their natural habitat!

Enjoy a picnic lunch in the heart of the reserve, surrounded by nature. Delight in a selection of local dishes while listening to the sounds of the wild. This is a great way to relax and recharge before continuing your adventure.

Continue your safari adventure with an afternoon drive. Explore different areas of the reserve and increase your chances of spotting the Big Five. The golden hour light makes for stunning photographs, so have your cameras ready!

After an exhilarating day, return to your lodge to unwind. Enjoy the beautiful sunset views over the savannah while sipping on a refreshing drink. This is a perfect time for the kids to share their favorite moments from the day.
Savor a delicious dinner at your lodge, featuring a mix of local and international cuisine. Share stories from your day and enjoy the warm atmosphere as you wind down for the evening.
Start your day with a hearty breakfast at your lodge, featuring a variety of local and international dishes to fuel your safari adventure. Enjoy the stunning views of the Maasai Mara as you dine.

Hop into a safari vehicle for an exhilarating morning game drive. Keep your eyes peeled for the majestic lions, elephants, and other wildlife that roam freely in the Maasai Mara. This is the perfect time to spot predators as they are most active in the cooler morning hours.
Return to the lodge for a delicious lunch. Enjoy a selection of fresh salads, grilled meats, and local specialties while sharing stories about the morning's wildlife encounters.

Set out again for an afternoon game drive. This time, explore different areas of the reserve, looking for the famous Big Five. The golden hour before sunset offers fantastic lighting for photography, so be ready to capture the beauty of the savannah.
After an exciting day of wildlife viewing, return to your lodge. Take some time to relax by the pool or enjoy the sunset views from your balcony.
Gather for dinner at the lodge, where you can savor a mix of local and international cuisine. Share your favorite moments from the day with your family as you enjoy the sounds of the African night.

transit.memo: Enjoy the scenic drive back to Nairobi, taking in the beautiful landscapes of the Great Rift Valley.

activities.description: Indulge in a unique dining experience at the famous Carnivore Restaurant, known for its variety of meats including game meat. A must-visit for meat lovers!
Explore Nairobi National Park, where you can see lions, giraffes, and rhinos against the backdrop of the city skyline. A perfect way to end your safari adventure!
Visit the Giraffe Centre to feed and learn about the endangered Rothschild giraffes. It's a fun and educational experience for the whole family!
Enjoy a delightful dinner at The Talisman, a restaurant known for its eclectic menu and cozy atmosphere. Perfect for a family meal after a day of adventure.

transit.memo: Direct flight back to Washington D.C.

activities.description: Enjoy a hearty breakfast at your hotel, featuring a mix of local and international dishes to fuel your journey home.

Take a final morning safari at Nairobi National Park, where you can spot lions, giraffes, and rhinos against the backdrop of the city skyline. This is a perfect way to end your Kenyan adventure with your family.

activities.activity: Return to the hotel and check out
activities.description: Head back to your hotel to pack up and check out. Make sure to gather all your belongings and souvenirs from your trip.
Savor a unique dining experience at the famous Carnivore Restaurant, known for its variety of meats served in a traditional African style. A great way to indulge in local flavors before your flight.

activities.activity: Transfer to Jomo Kenyatta International Airport
activities.description: Leave for the airport, allowing ample time for check-in and security procedures. Enjoy the last glimpses of Nairobi as you head to the airport.
